key_finding: V|nums is FUNCTIONAL: accuracy-conditional (correct>incorrect, p<0.01 at 3/4 layers) and difficulty-dependent (hard 5-13x easy, p<0.001 all layers). BUT difficulty effect driven by text informativeness collapse (nums_R<0 for hard), not V_R increase. V is dominant info source for hard problems (15/20 bins) but redundant for easy.
evidence_impact: Two new evidence entries (#116-117). Forward-looking signal confirmed as functional, not just positional. Adds nuance: hidden channel matters most when text is least informative.
next_planned: Cross-model replication of difficulty effect on Phi/Mistral, or harder benchmark (MATH) for more incorrect problems and stronger difficulty gradient.
